channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dems Call on Commerce's Lutnick to Resign Over Epstein
item.description: Every Democrat on the House Oversight Committee called for Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick's resignation, accusing him of lying.

item.title: Rep. Massie to Newsmax: Trump Knows I'm 'Tough to Beat'
item.description: Rep. Thomas Massie told Newsmax he is unfazed by President Trump's attacks, saying Trump privately respects him despite public opposition.

item.title: Sen. Cassidy to Newsmax: I've Delivered for La.; My Opponent Hasn't
item.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy used a Newsmax interview before his Republican primary to argue his legislative record, not President Trump's endorsement, matters.

item.title: When Antarctic Headlines Melt Faster Than the Ice
